title: quercus dolicholepis var. elliptica
intro: Quercus dolicholepis var. elliptica is a variety of oak tree native to China, characterized by its elliptical leaves and is a type of deciduous tree. The medicinal properties of Quercus dolicholepis var. elliptica lie in its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Quercus dolicholepis var. elliptica is traditionally used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tonics, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
